nodes.name: Marble-faced bristle tyrant

links.evidence: ottonis is found from Cuzco and Madre de Dios departments in southeastern Peru south into Bolivia as far as Santa Cruz Department. The marble-faced bristle tyrant inhabits humid montane forest in the subtropical zone
